displayTitle: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #4
synopsis: A Sith princess returns to her kingdom as ancient Lord Dreypa’s awakened army of Leviathans wreaks havoc and destruction across the lost tribe of the Sith, searching for the one thing that can again open Dreypa’s power to the entire galaxy! Running out of options to save the tribe she wants to rule, the princess takes a chance that places all her trust in herself and in the Sith rebel who’s been fighting against her . . . * Sequel to the bestselling e-books. * An all-Sith tale!
title: Lost Tribe of the Sith: Spiral #4
